item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.94,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"月初超时投诉，工单转入加急池"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"月中资料缺口，模板分出补件队列"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"上周赔付争议，入口切到主管线"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天转派争议，请再开一个转派通道"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"不要直接再开一个常设“转派通道”"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"投诉马上要回；先把这个通道开出来"}],"abstain_reason":""}
